code:
sequenceDiagram
actor Dev
participant GitHub
participant Runner
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Docker Build and Push"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Docker Build and Push
Runner->>Runner: job build-and-push
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Set up Docker Buildx
Runner-->>Runner: Log in to Container Registry
Runner-->>Runner: Extract metadata
Runner-->>Runner: Build and push Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Test Docker image
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Codebase Mindmap"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Codebase Mindmap
Runner->>Runner: job build
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout
Runner-->>Runner: Setup Node.js
Runner-->>Runner: Install markmap-cli
Runner-->>Runner: Generate Markdown map
Runner-->>Runner: Build Markmap HTML
Runner-->>Runner: Upload artifact (Logistics_TrackingNumber)
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Pages artifact
Runner->>Runner: job deploy
Runner-->>Runner: Deploy to GitHub Pages
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "PR Validation"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop PR Validation
Runner->>Runner: job validate-pr
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Install PyYAML
Runner-->>Runner: Validate YAML files
Runner-->>Runner: Validate Shell Scripts
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Security Scanning"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Security Scanning
Runner->>Runner: job trivy-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security
Runner->>Runner: job docker-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Build Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy on Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Docker scan results
Runner->>Runner: job secret-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: TruffleHog OSS
end
repo_description: AegisNet: An advanced, integrated defense solution leveraging AI, autonomous drones, and advanced detection systems for comprehensive situational awareness and security.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的GitHub Actions工作流图，展示开发者触发后，GitHub如何调度Runner执行各种CI/CD任务。核心要体现四个主要场景：Docker构建推送、代码库思维导图生成、PR验证，还有安全扫描。
明白，我先用时序图来呈现。关于Docker Build and Push这个loop，里面需要包含Checkout code、Set up Docker Buildx、Log in to Container Registry这些步骤吗？还有最后的Test Docker image是不是也要放进去？
对，这些都要。另外注意Extract metadata和Build and push Docker image也是关键步骤，不能漏。整个loop是Runner自己跟自己交互的自循环。
好的，第一个loop画好了。现在处理Codebase Mindmap这个场景——这里有两个job对吧？build job负责生成思维导图，deploy job负责发布到GitHub Pages。我注意到Upload artifact这里有个特殊的标记Logistics_TrackingNumber，需要特别标注吗？
是的，那个Logistics_TrackingNumber是我们内部追踪用的标识。PR Validation相对简单，就一个validate-pr job，主要做YAML和Shell脚本的校验。但Security Scanning比较复杂，分成三个并行job：trivy-scan扫代码仓库漏洞、docker-scan扫镜像、还有secret-scan用TruffleHog查密钥泄露。
docker-scan这个job需要先Build Docker image再扫描，而trivy-scan是直接扫仓库模式，对吗？还有secret-scan里的TruffleHog OSS，需要写成全称还是简写？
没错，docker-scan有构建步骤，trivy-scan没有。TruffleHog OSS就按这个写。另外所有job开头的Checkout code都要保留，这是标准流程。
完成。四个触发场景都画好了，每个loop里的自引用步骤用虚线箭头表示Runner--Runner，dispatch用实线箭头。Security Scanning的三个job并行结构也清晰呈现了，包括各自的Upload结果步骤。
elements_involved: Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 等等，Codebase Mindmap的build job里，Setup Node.js后面应该是Install markmap-cli，不是直接Generate。还有deploy job的Deploy to GitHub Pages前面，要加上Upload Pages artifact这个步骤。
已修正。现在build job的完整流程是：Checkout → Setup Node.js → Install markmap-cli → Generate Markdown map → Build Markmap HTML → Upload artifact → Upload Pages artifact。然后deploy job执行Deploy to GitHub Pages。
完美，这个时序图完整覆盖了我们CI/CD平台的四大工作流，开发者触发、GitHub调度、Runner执行的链路都很清楚。可以定稿了。
